American Baptist Foreign Mission Society records
American Baptist Foreign Mission Society

62 microfilm reels. 62 microfilm reels.
1813-1961. Microfilms of correspondence and files. Missionary correspondence (1817-1900) and geographic files relating to activities of the American Baptist Foreign Mission Society in Burma. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD ? (62 microfilm reels) ======= ? (62 microfilm reels) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2089307

Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Missionary correspondence (1817-1900) and geographic files relating to activities of the American Baptist Foreign Mission Society in Burma.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Missionary correspondence, 1829-1900
Reels FM-1 - FM-115
Series II. Subject file--Burma
Reels 700-1-1 - 712-1-3
Available Copies:
Originals at American Baptist Historical Society, 3001 Mercer University Drive, Atlanta, GA 30341.
Cite As:
American Baptist Foreign Mission Society records, #4424. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Restrictions on Use:
Reproductions cannot be made from this collection. Please contact the American Baptist Historical Society at abhs@abhsarchives.org.
Restrictions on Use:
For permission to publish contact: American Baptist Historical Society, 3001 Mercer University Drive, Atlanta, GA 30341.

Scope and Contents
This series contains the publications, photographs, and letters of Ethel Hunt. Ethel Hunt was a missionary with the Woman's American Baptist Mission Society and served in Burma from 1918-1923, mostly at the Moulwein School for Girls.Publications by Morton Lane Girls School, Moulmein1910-19501**1Publications about missionary practices in Burma1910-19501**2-4Photographs of Moulmein, students, and staff1910-19251**5-7Photographs of students1910-19251**10-11Lectures1910-19251**8Correspondence1910-19251**9 ======= Series I. Policy,19417113-1Burma ? Mission Press. The Remington Burmese typewriter7121-1Burma ? Mission Press. History of press7121-2Burma ? Mission Press. Pamphlets7121-3Series III. Ethel Hunt's documents
Scope and Contents
This series contains the publications, photographs, and letters of Ethel Hunt. Ethel Hunt was a missionary with the Woman's American Baptist Mission Society and served in Burma from 1918-1923, mostly at the Moulwein School for Girls.Publications by Morton Lane Girls School, Moulmein1910-19501**1Publications about missionary practices in Burma1910-19501**2-4Photographs of Moulmein, students, and staff1910-19251**5-7Photographs of students1910-19251**10-11Lectures1910-19251**8Correspondence1910-19251**9 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
